description: Fragment of a deed of sale for one half of a sugar factory (al-Dār al-Sukkariyya) in Minyat Zifta. Dating: probably ca. 12th century. One of the boundaries of the property is another property held in partnership between "the son of the Rav" and a qāḍī. One of the parties is Abū l-Murajjā Sālim. Other neighboring properties are known by the names of the heirs of Ḥusayn b. Ibrāhīm al-Maʿarrī; and Sālim Ibn al-Ashqar. On verso there are jotted accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals, mentioning wheat. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 292, 531, 590, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: קטע שטר מכר של מחצית ממפעל סוכר (דאר אל-סוקריה) במניה זפתה. כנראה כ-מאה 12. אחד הגבולות הוא נכס שמוחזק בשותפות בין בן הרב לקאדי. אחד הצדדים הוא אבו אל-מורג'א סאלם.
